title: The Influence of Corporate Social Responsibility, Dividend Payout Ratio, Intellectual Capital, and Profitability on Firm Value of Companies Affected by the Covid-19 Pandemic
author: Azharina Riska Dev
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This research aims to examine and analyze the effect of corporate social responsibility, dividend payout ratio, intellectual capital, and profitability on firm value of companies affected by the covid-19 pandemic. This research is a quantitative research using multiple linear regression analysis method with SPSS 25 software. The population in this study are companies in the food and beverage sector which are listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange in 2020 -2021. Sampling was determined using purposive sampling method so that 44 companies were obtained. The type of data used is secondary data obtained from www.idx.co.idas well as the official website of each company. The results showed that corporate social responsibility, dividend payout ratio, and intellectual capital has no significant effect on firm value, while profitability has a significant effect on firm value.
